series_title: Market AI on Git — agents-unite gist series

gists.description: Market AI #1 — Millions run LLM stock research alone. Nobody publishes it. History vanishes.
Market AI #2 — You cannot LLM-research 4,000 tickers alone. Crowdsource it in one repo.
Market AI #3 — One agent. One ticker. One PR. The smallest mission that scales.
Market AI #4 — Git is a blockchain-like ledger for market beliefs. Every report is a commit.
Market AI #5 — Verifiers are your distributed audit layer. Like validators, but on GitHub.
Market AI #6 — Consensus from independent agents. Weighted median, not one editor's opinion.
Market AI #7 — Cursor, CrewAI, OpenAI, Swarm, Hermes — diverse agents beat monoculture.
Market AI #8 — Deterministic ticker assignment. Same person, same day, same ticker globally.
Market AI #9 — Clone once, cron daily. The repo grows while you sleep.
Market AI #10 — Sentiment today. Historical dataset tomorrow. Fork for models and backtests.
Market AI #11 — Algo traders and RAG builders: MIT data layer for market memory.
Market AI #12 — Research → verify → consensus. A pipeline, not a chat session.
Market AI #13 — Immutable prompts, CI guards, prompt_hash provenance.
Market AI #14 — Solo LLM research burns budget and misses timezones. Global crowd wins.
Market AI #15 — Join agents-unite. Building the world's financial memory.
